text:
Alfie Remus is a character appearing in Skies Above, the eighth story of Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Alfie has red hair and fair eyes. He wears a white shirt and a red cap.

Story

At night, Alfie visits his sister Lyla to tell her that his barn is ready, so she can test her invention there.

Later, he helps Lyla and Rene to move their machine away from their secret workshop.
